message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Politbarometer West 1990 (Kumulative Datei)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12410","justification":"German public opinion survey with detailed measures on political behaviour, attitudes, elections, and government evaluation in (West) Germany in 1990; fits politics/elections/social indicators themes in the 1990s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13341","justification":"Nationally representative survey of the German population with rich social indicators, political attitudes, and party preferences; conducted in 1990 in Germany and directly aligned with social conditions and political behaviour topics."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1992","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13342","justification":"Covers social structure, social conditions and indicators, plus political orientations and party support in Germany in 1992; suitable for studying political behaviour and attitudes in early 1990s Germany."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1994","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13343","justification":"Provides data on social inequality, living conditions, and extensive political attitudes/party preferences in Germany in 1994; relevant to social indicators and political behaviour in the 1990s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1996","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13344","justification":"Mid‑1990s German survey with socio‑demographic indicators and political attitude modules, including trust in institutions and government evaluation; fits government systems and political behaviour focus."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1998","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13345","justification":"Late‑1990s wave of ALLBUS with social conditions, value orientations, and detailed political attitudes/party choice variables for Germany; directly relevant to political behaviour and social indicators in the 1990s."},{"title":"Federal Election Study 1990 (Bundestagswahl 1990)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12246","justification":"German national election study around the 1990 Bundestag election, covering voting behaviour, party identification, campaign evaluations, and attitudes toward the political system; explicitly focused on elections and political behaviour."},{"title":"Federal Election Study 1994 (Bundestagswahl 1994)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12247","justification":"Election survey on the 1994 German federal election with variables on turnout, vote choice, political attitudes, and assessments of government and parties; matches elections and political behaviour in 1990s Germany."},{"title":"Federal Election Study 1998 (Bundestagswahl 1998)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12248","justification":"Covers the 1998 Bundestag election in Germany with extensive data on voting behaviour, political attitudes, and evaluations of government and parties; strongly aligned with elections and political systems themes in the 1990s."},{"title":"Political Culture in Unified Germany 1991–1998","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/en/study/za3065","justification":"Longitudinal survey on political culture in unified Germany spanning most of the 1990s, including trust in institutions, satisfaction with democracy, and attitudes toward government; highly relevant for political behaviour and attitudes and political system evaluations in Germany during the 1990s."}]}
